mapper.select:
SELECT USER_ID as userId, USER_LOGIN_ID as userLoginId, NAME, EMAIL, NICKNAME, ROLE, EXP, POINT, STATUS, CREATED_AT as createdAt FROM LQ_USER
AND USER_LOGIN_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND NICKNAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY USER_ID
ASC DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LQ_USER ( user_id, user_login_id, name, email, password, nickname, birth, gender, role, exp, point, status, created_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_LQ_USER_PK.nextval, #{userLoginId}, #{name}, #{email}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{birth}, #{gender}, #{role}, #{exp}, #{point}, #{status}, sysdate )
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, user_login_id, name, email, password, nickname, birth, gender, role, exp, point, status, created_at FROM LQ_USER WHERE user_id = #{value}
SELECT user_id, user_login_id, name, email, password, nickname, birth, gender, role, exp, point, status FROM LQ_USER WHERE user_login_id = #{value}
SELECT user_id, user_login_id, name, email, password, nickname, birth, gender, role, exp, point, status FROM LQ_USER WHERE email = #{value}
mapper.update:
UPDATE LQ_USER
nickname = #{nickname},
password = #{password},
WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, user_login_id, name, email, password, nickname, birth, gender, role, exp, point, status FROM LQ_USER WHERE name = #{name} AND email = #{email} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT user_id, user_login_id, name, email, password, nickname, birth, gender, role, exp, point, status FROM LQ_USER WHERE user_login_id = #{userLoginId} AND email = #{email} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
